name: Documents
description: Read and analyze EXISTING local files: answer questions about file contents, search text within files, summarize existing documents. ONLY for reading existing files, NOT for creating or writing new content — use Files for that.
author: MUSE

actions.description: Answer a question about the contents of a file or folder
Search for content across files in a directory
Summarize a document or set of files
Index a folder for faster future searches
